# requirements.txt — works for ALL 3 repos
# yt-autopilot + dailybyte-insta + biohacker/kids channels

# TTS — free, no API key
edge-tts>=6.1.10

# YouTube upload
google-api-python-client>=2.140.0
google-auth>=2.34.0
google-auth-oauthlib>=1.2.0

# HTTP (Gemini REST + Pexels + Instagram)
requests>=2.32.0

# Utilities
python-dotenv>=1.0.1
